message:
refinery: detect stale claims and orphaned MR branches (#1285)

Add queue anomaly detection for open merge requests in refinery:
- stale claims (warning at 2h, critical at 6h)
- orphaned branches (missing local + missing origin/* tracking ref)
Surfaces anomaly outputs in `gt refinery ready` (human + JSON).

Closes #691

Co-authored-by: David Ahmann <dilmurat.personal@gmail.com>
